© Internet Alchemy, Inc. 1
Bonus
Big Idea Crowdsource Call
Behind the most successful webinars, there’s
always a “big idea”... a very compelling (and
often counter-intuitive) idea that becomes like
a “mind virus” for your prospects… they can’t
forget about your offer.
If you nail your big idea… you have won half
the battle on your webinar.

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2
How this is going to work…
• I’m going to be asking for volunteers who want to work on the “Big Idea”
for their webinar
• I’ll unmute your line
• We’ll talk BRIEFLY about your business
• And then we’ll do a great big group brainstorm
• During the brainstorm, please type your ideas into the question box
• We’ll work on the Big Idea together
• Then we’ll go onto our next volunteer
• It’s that simple
How to ask a question…
• To ask a question live, click on the
hand icon in the GoToWebinar
Control Panel
• If you need help, send an email to
support@webinarfunnelformula.com
